sentences.arabic: دَعَتْنِي عَائِلَةٌ مَحَلِّيَّةٌ إِلَى بَيْتِهَا لِلْغَدَاءِ.
sentences.translation: Lokalna porodica me pozvala na ručak u svom domu.
sentences.translationEn: A local family invited me to their home for lunch.

sentences.arabic: قَدَّمُوا لِيَ أَطْبَاقًا تَقْلِيدِيَّةً بَيَّضًا عَلَيْهَا.
sentences.translation: Poslužili su mi tradiciona jela s ponosom.
sentences.translationEn: They served me traditional dishes with pride.

sentences.arabic: جَلَسْنَا مَعًا وَتَحَدَّثْنَا عَنْ حَيَاتِهِمْ وَبَلَدِهِمْ.
sentences.translation: Sjedili smo zajedno i razgovarali o njihovom životu i zemlji.
sentences.translationEn: We sat together and talked about their lives and their country.

sentences.translation: Osjećao sam toplinu i iskreno gostoprimstvo.
sentences.translationEn: I felt warmth and sincere hospitality.

sentences.arabic: قُلْتُ لَهُمْ شُكْرًا مِنَ الْقَلْبِ وَأَنَا أَغَادِرُ.
sentences.translation: Rekao sam im srdačno hvala pri odlasku.
sentences.translationEn: I thanked them heartily as I left.
